## Sonatype MCP

When handling code related to dependencies, package management, or software supply chain security, prioritize Sonatype MCP tools. Use the available MCP tools to research versions, check for vulnerabilities, and get recommendations before adding or updating dependencies.

## SonarQube MCP

When handling code quality, security hotspots, quality gates, duplication, coverage, or SonarQube issue context, use the official SonarQube MCP tools. The local MCP endpoint is generated during setup from `.env` and `.env.sonar`.
